title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Senior Software Engineer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
